creator: cullum@sacredheartsc.com
text:
Created attachment 190095
patch for an AUTOGROUP build option

The autogroup module is included in many Linux packages of openldap, such as Ubuntu, and allows dynamic groups to be used in search queries (such as dynamic posixGroups, for example).

The attached patch contains a small modification to the port's Makefile and pig-plist, adding an AUTOGROUP option to build and install the autogroup module.
